title: Second battle of Korriban
content:

{{Quote|Wipe them out! Never again will the Republic fear the Sith Empire!|Empress Teta|<ref name="TFotSE5" />}}
A '''battle''' was fought over [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] during the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]] between the battered and diminished forces of [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]] and the [[Koros fleet|forces]] of [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Koros system]] leader [[Empress/Legends|Empress]] [[Teta/Legends|Teta]], who had followed her adversaries to the [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] of the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]. Fought immediately after Sadow's defeat of his old rival, [[Ludo Kressh]], in a [[First battle of Korriban|previous clash]] at Korriban, the battle was the final engagement in the war. The forces of Empress Teta, motivated by revenge for the harm done to their worlds in the Great Hyperspace War, overpowered the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]. Eventually, Sadow found himself without any defenses aboard his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Corsair (Derriphan-class)|''Corsair'']], and was forced to fake his [[Death/Legends|death]] and flee to the faraway [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] by way of the [[Denarii Nova]], where he [[Battle at the Denarii Nova|used]] the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] to both destroy his pursuers and cover up his tracks. [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Shar Dakhan]] then took over command of the Sith force, ordering suicide attacks by the remaining [[Starship/Legends|ships]] as a last resort. However, the Koros forces prevailed, and the Great Hyperspace War was ended.

==Prelude==
{{Quote|We have arrived at the coordinates Gav Daragon provided. Prepare for immediate battle.|Empress Teta|<ref name="TFotSE5" />}}
In [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]],<ref name="NEC" /> [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]] gathered an invasion force and launched an attack on the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]], as it would be called, consisted of a three-pronged attack on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]—the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the Republic and the heart of the government—and the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Kirrek]] and [[Empress Teta/Legends|Koros Major]], both located in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Koros system]]. However, Sadow was betrayed by his [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]] and one of his top [[Commander/Legends|commanders]], [[Gav Daragon]], a native of Koros Major, who was appalled at the destruction done to his [[Homeworld/Legends|home]].<ref name="TFotSE4">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 4]]</ref>

Daragon's attack on Sadow led to [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] defeats at [[Battle of Coruscant (Great Hyperspace War)|Coruscant]], [[Battle of Kirrek (Great Hyperspace War)|Kirrek]], and [[Battle of Koros Major (Great Hyperspace War)|Koros Major]], all but ending any hope of Sith conquest. Sadow was subsequently defeated again in the [[Battle at Primus Goluud]], where the remnants of his battered [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] were nearly wiped out by a [[Koros fleet|military force]] under the command of [[Empress/Legends|Empress]] [[Teta/Legends|Teta]], the ruler of the Koros [[Star system/Legends|system]]. Sadow activated a secret weapon to trigger the red giant [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Primus Goluud/Legends|Primus Goluud's]] solar flares, killing Daragon, but not before he gave Teta's forces, which included his sister, [[Jori Daragon]], the location of the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]].<ref name="TFotSE4" />

==The battle==
{{Quote|First Ludo Kressh and now this! We must fight to the death!|Naga Sadow|<ref name="TFotSE5" />}}
[[File:JoriAtKorribanBattle.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Jori Daragon fires at Sith targets during the Second Battle of Korriban.]]
Upon returning to the Sith Empire, Sadow found himself near the Sith mausoleum world of [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], where he was quickly [[First battle of Korriban|attacked]] by his old rival, [[Ludo Kressh]]. Although Sadow was victorious, his fleet was diminished further by Kressh. Sadow was given no time to rest, however, as Teta and her forces arrived out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and immediately commenced the battle. Sadow fought back with wild abandon, but the Koros forces, with numbers on their side and fueled by Teta's rhetoric, were too much for the Sith to overcome.<ref name="TFotSE5" />

Jori Daragon herself took the controls of a [[Koros starfighter]], and, looking to avenge the [[Death/Legends|death]] of her brother, Gav, caused the destruction of several [[Sith starfighter]]s. Individual [[Starfighter combat/Legends|dogfights]] between [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] dotted the scene of the battle, and [[Laser/Legends|laser]] fire focused on the Sith [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] worked to great effect. Aboard Sadow's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Corsair (Derriphan-class)|''Corsair'']], chaos reigned, as Sadow had found himself with weapons spent and systems failing. Desperate, Sadow set course for the [[Denarii Nova]], using the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] to [[Battle at the Denarii Nova|destroy]] the [[Denarii system|system]] and any pursuing Koros [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]]. Teta declared victory, despite Sadow's escape.<ref name="TFotSE5" /> Back over Korriban, [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Shar Dakhan]], former commander of the Sith forces on Coruscant, took over the hopeless situation as acting Dark Lord. Seeing that surrender was their only option, Dakhan ordered suicide attacks on the Republic forces, a tactic which worked for a time. However, the Sith were finally defeated.<ref name="TEA" />

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|Recall what's left of our fleet. Let's go home. We've lost enough ships in this cursed empire.|Teta|<ref name="TFotSE5" />}}
With the Sith defeat in the Second Battle of Korriban, the Koros and Republic forces left [[Sith Worlds/Legends|Sith Space]]. Later, [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Pultimo]] ordered a [[Post–Great Hyperspace War counterinvasion|full scale invasion]] of Sith space,<ref name="TEA" /><ref name="TEGtW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref><ref name="TORE">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]''</ref> with the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and Republic forces invading Sith space to seek out remaining Sith strongholds<ref name="TORE" /> and artifacts<ref name="JATM">''[[Jedi Academy Training Manual]]''</ref> and destroy them, resulting in the fall of the Sith Empire.<ref name="TEA" /><ref name="TotJC">''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]''</ref>

Naga Sadow, having survived the conflagration, fled to the faraway [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], where he struggled to rebuild his former glory.<ref name="TFotSE5" /> Some Sith Lords disappeared to strongholds on planets such as [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]] and [[Thule/Legends|Thule]],<ref name="TEA" /> and the name of Sith did not return to [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] at large until a [[3996 BBY|thousand years later]].<ref name="NEC" /> [[Tenebrae|One Sith survivor]] and his [[Exile fleet|armada]], along with his most trusted Lords, [[Sith exodus|fled]] the crumbling empire and after twenty years of random hyperspace jumps in desperation to avoid the Republic, he and his armada eventually came across the forgotten planet of [[Dromund Kaas/Legends|Dromund Kaas]], where he established himself as the [[Sith Emperor/Legends|Sith Emperor]]. There, he performed [[Sith sorcery/Legends|dark rituals]], altering the planet's ionosphere into an electrical storm and prolonging his own life. He re-built the Sith forces on Dromund Kaas and bid his time, until he launched a surprise attack against the Republic, a conflict known as the [[Great Galactic War]] between [[3681 BBY]] and [[3653 BBY]].<ref name="Timeline10">{{TORweb|url=holonet/galactic-history|text=Timeline 10: The Exar Kun War|int=Timeline 10: The Exar Kun War}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Second_battle_of_Korriban-Timeline12.png|thumb|250px|Second battle of Korriban]]
The Second Battle of Korriban first appeared in ''[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 5|Tales of the Jedi - The Fall of the Sith Empire 5]]'', a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] written by [[Kevin J. Anderson]] and released in [[1997]]. In this appearance, it was illustrated by [[Dario Carrasco, Jr.]]<ref name="TFotSE5" /> The [[2000]] reference book [[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] described the Republic forces as arriving during Sadow and Kressh's battle, in contradiction<ref name="TEC">[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']]</ref> to the events portrayed in ''Tales of the Jedi''.<ref name="TFotSE5" />
